title: BUZZEAP LED Mosquito Killer Lamp, 3800V Electric Mosquito Zapper with Dual-Wave 365+395nm UV Light, 360° Attract Electric Bug Zapper, Insect Pest Fly Killer Trap, IPXS Waterproof, for Indoor & Outdoor
features: Highly Effective Mosquito Killer: High Intensity Electric Insect Killer Lamp Mosquito Killer uses dual-wave (365 NM+395NM) LED UV bulbs, which utilise human bionic technology to effectively attract mosquitoes and kill them with high pressure at 3800 V. The energy-saving and powerful UV bulb lasts for up to 8500 hours. Electric Insect Pest Fly Killer is very effective against mosquitoes, flies, moths and other flying insects.

LARGE AREA COVERAGE: The Bug Zapper 360° UV Mosquito Killer effectively covers a large area up to 2400square feet, with a hook on the top, you can hang the mosquito killer anywhere or stand it directly on a tabletop, simply mount the mosquito trap where you need it.

IPX4 WATERPROOF: Mosquito Killer Lamp has no problem to be used in the rain, it is completely splash-proof. Hang the Mosquito Killer Lamp anywhere there is AC power or use the sturdy base to stand on a flat surface, reduce the limitations of the mosquito killer lamp for indoor and outdoor use and keep mosquitoes away from anywhere you are. Suitable for bedroom, living room, toilet, kitchen, hotel, patio, balcony, garage, deck.

SAFETY AND ENVIRONMENTAL FRIENDLY: No chemicals, no odour, physical method to kill mosquitoes, ensure the safety of human and pets. Provides reliable and effective indoor/outdoor mosquito control and releases UV light in 360 degrees. Very Quiet, turn it on three hours before bedtime and let you sleep like a baby without annoying bugs chirping and mosquito bites.

EASY MAINTENANCE: The Electric Mosquito Zapper has a removable tray where dead insects collect at the bottom of the unit and can be easily removed for quick, safe and easy cleaning. The shell of the Insect Bug Catcher is made of flame retardant ABS material which is safe and heat resistant.
